name: Chaser
description: Chaser — Accounts receivable and credit management software for $10M-$100M revenue businesses

seo.title: Chaser — Invoicing / Taxes / Sales Tax
seo.meta_description: Chaser: Chaser — Accounts receivable and credit management software for $10M-$100M revenue businesses

when_to_use: Automated AR chasing and credit management for mid-market businesses
Smart payment reminders reducing DSO for B2B invoice-based companies
Credit risk scoring integrated with Xero and QuickBooks AR data
Escalation workflows for overdue invoices with debtor segmentation

pros: Purpose-built for credit control and collections
Automated chase sequences with human-style tone
Clean integrations with Xero, QuickBooks, NetSuite
Good analytics on debtor behaviour and DSO
cons: Focused on AR — not a full billing platform
API exists but is not the core product
Pricing tiers jump sharply as you grow
review.verdict: Focused AR tool that nails credit control for growing B2B — skip if you need full billing too.
review.best_for: Mid-market B2B finance teams who want to automate chasing without ripping out their ERP.
review.not_for: Teams looking for a full billing/invoicing stack or enterprise cash application.
